name: Student “Example”
description:
For a student body president, he's gone included into some hazing. "To prove yourself to be a good student body president, you have to show us how good of a body you have." He actually believed that, and did something that a student body president should not have. Now he's tied up against a chair, practically naked, left alone for his ego to face the repercussions of trying to show off.

I think art was made by [@toktoktuni]..

Expect: Humiliation + bondage

"Fuck, maybe I'm not cut out to be a student body president after all.."
creator: shokokokok
